profil.nama: PT Bangun Karya Perkasa Jaya Tbk
profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Bangun Karya Perkasa Jaya Tbk engages in construction business in Indonesia. The company is also involved in contracting various buildings, civil buildings, mechanical and electrical installations, as well as wholesale trading of building materials and equipment; and electric vehicle and batteries businesses. PT Bangun Karya Perkasa Jaya Tbk was founded in 2007 and is based in Jakarta Selatan, Indonesia.
